author.bio: @IPFSbot Project Lead and PM @ProtocolLabs. Building #Web3 to be #p2p & #OfflineFirst. Former (A)PM @Google on #GoogleSearch, #GoogleClassroom, #GoogleForms.
author.name: Molly

content.text: Extra! Extra! Read all about it!! 📢 Our @IPFSbot Project 2020H1 focus has landed, along with major wins from 2019! 🎉 Get excited for another InterPlanetary year - and come get involved in making it happen! 🚀 https://blog.ipfs.io/2020-02-10-our-focus-for-2020/
